agent_summary: Customer reports a failed payment with possible balance deduction for 1200 BDT via TXN-9301.
recommended_next_action: Check TXN-9301 ledger status and initiate standard reversal flow only if eligibility is confirmed.
customer_reply: We have noted your concern about transaction TXN-9301. Our payments team will review it and any eligible amount will be returned through official channels. We will contact you through official support channels. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone.
